title: Applications
subtitle: Connect external apps so OpenClaw can use them as tools.

banner.mockDesc: Composio proxy is not configured. All connections are simulated so you can try the UI. Set the COMPOSIO_PROXY_URL env var to connect for real.
banner.proxyUnreachableDesc: Check COMPOSIO_PROXY_URL and COMPOSIO_PROXY_TOKEN in the ClawX .env file.
